content.content:
1→---
     2→# GitLab Token Setup for Transflow MR Integration
     3→# This playbook configures GITLAB_TOKEN for the ploy user on VPS
     4→
     5→- name: Setup GitLab Token for Transflow MR Integration
     6→  hosts: linux_hosts
     7→  become: true
     8→  vars_files:
     9→    - ../vars/main.yml
    10→
    11→  tasks:
    12→    - name: Validate GitLab token is available locally
    13→      fail:
    14→        msg: |
    15→          GitLab token not set in local environment.
    16→          Please set: export GITLAB_TOKEN="your-gitlab-token"
    17→          Then run: ansible-playbook playbooks/gitlab-token.yml
    18→      when: lookup('env', 'GITLAB_TOKEN') == ''
    19→
    20→    - name: Validate GitLab URL is available locally
    21→      fail:
    22→        msg: |
    23→          GitLab URL not set in local environment.
    24→          Please set: export GITLAB_URL="https://gitlab.com"
    25→          Then run: ansible-playbook playbooks/gitlab-token.yml
    26→      when: lookup('env', 'GITLAB_URL') == ''
    27→
    28→    - name: Add GitLab token to ploy user environment
    29→      blockinfile:
    30→        path: /home/ploy/.bashrc
    31→        create: true
    32→        owner: ploy
    33→        group: ploy
    34→        mode: '0644'
    35→        block: |
    36→          # GitLab integration for Transflow MR creation
    37→          export GITLAB_TOKEN="{{ lookup('env', 'GITLAB_TOKEN') }}"
    38→          export GITLAB_URL="{{ lookup('env', 'GITLAB_URL') }}"
    39→        marker: "# {mark} ANSIBLE MANAGED BLOCK - GitLab Token"
    40→
    41→    - name: Test GitLab authentication
    42→      shell: |
    43→        export GITLAB_TOKEN="{{ lookup('env', 'GITLAB_TOKEN') }}"
    44→        export GITLAB_URL="{{ lookup('env', 'GITLAB_URL') }}"
    45→        curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITLAB_TOKEN" $GITLAB_URL/api/v4/user
    46→      register: gitlab_auth_test
    47→      become_user: ploy
    48→      failed_when: gitlab_auth_test.rc != 0
    49→
    50→    - name: Display GitLab authentication status
    51→      debug:
    52→        msg: "GitLab authentication test: {{ 'PASSED' if gitlab_auth_test.rc == 0 else 'FAILED' }}"
